scripts.build: for p in packages/*/src/index.ts; do bun build --target=bun --outdir=/tmp/sffmc-build ""; done
scripts.test:all: shopt -s nullglob; for p in packages/*/package.json; do d=$(dirname "$p"); for t in "$d"/tests/*.test.ts "$d"/test/*.test.ts "$d"/src/*.test.ts; do rel="${t#$d/}"; (cd "$d" && bun test "$rel" >/dev/null 2>&1) || { echo "FAIL: $t"; exit 1; }; done; done
scripts.typecheck: for p in packages/*/; do (cd "$p" && bun build --target=bun --no-bundle src/index.ts 2>&1) | grep -v "bun build" || true; done
scripts.precommit: bun run typecheck && bun run test:all && python3 scripts/audit-load-order.py && bun run audit:public && bun run audit:redos && bun run check:cleanroom && bun run scripts/run-health.ts
scripts.publish:packages: for p in packages/*/package.json; do d=$(dirname "$p"); (cd "$d" && bun publish --dry-run) || exit 1; done
